title: GeoLAB Regional Indicator Finder: semantic search over INKAR 2025 regional indicators
description: Semantic discovery of INKAR 2025 regional-indicator metadata (BBSR): plain-language search with filters over spatial level, theme and year, using a multilingual bge-m3 bi-encoder and a cross-encoder reranker. This record is the regional-indicator deployment of the shared GeoLAB metadata-finder codebase (the SOEP-variable deployment is archived separately). Code only; no data included.
